title: AFRL-ES Scheduler: Adaptive Reinforcement Learning-Based Edge Scheduling for Age of Information in IoT
description: Article-faithful implementation of the AFRL-ES framework for adaptive reinforcement learning-based edge scheduling in IoT networks. The project includes simulation configuration, synthetic IoT edge environment generation, priority scoring, lightweight reinforcement-learning coefficient adaptation, evaluation metrics, reference-method reproduction, tests, and plotting scripts.
